info.title: Stellar API
info.description: REST API for the Stellar community tracker. All routes under `/api/*`. Authentication uses JWT cookies (`token` cookie set on login).

200.description: Nick claim opened (returns the verification code + instructions), nick cleared, or already verified

409.description: Nick already verified by another account

200.description: Paginated list of account recovery requests

get.summary: Community Reputation Score over time (own trend series)

200.description: Donor reward settings and active perks

403.description: Perk not enabled for this rank

200.description: Historical site stat snapshots (ascending by capturedAt)

post.summary: Manually trigger a site stat snapshot (admin only)

200.description: Historical user stat snapshots (ascending by capturedAt)
Stylesheet adopted into the Site Stylesheet slot
The stored, sanitized stylesheet source as CSS
Topic session view model (forum + topic + posts + poll + subscription + affordances)
Topic moved to the trash board

403.description: Not a member of this community
Not a member of this community

200.description: Release contributions with rip-quality and edition identity

403.description: Not a member of this community

200.description: Staff listing grouped by staff group
Count of tickets with unread staff replies

get.description: The composable Rule/SubRule tree with CRS weights (PRD-05 #1), plus the resolved ${...} variables map (PRD-09 / ADR-0020)

200.description: Rule tree (each rule with its nested sub-rules) and the variables map the UI substitutes into the verbatim bodies

post.summary: Send a friend request (or accept a reciprocal pending one)

200.description: A reciprocal pending request existed and was accepted (now friends)

409.description: Already friends or a request is already pending

delete.summary: Remove a friend or cancel a request

post.summary: Accept a pending request from a user

404.description: No pending request from this user

post.summary: Reject a pending request from a user

404.description: No pending request from this user

put.summary: Set a note on an accepted friendship

200.description: Most recent grant within the idempotency window

post.summary: Score a pasted EAC/XLD rip log (0–100; 100 = verified perfect)
